cognitum-seed.comment: LOCAL Cognitum Seed hardware appliance = the code-intelligence root. 114 MCP tools / 21 groups / 3 scopes (minimal 18, default 24, full 114): identity, vector memory, cognitive witness chains, coherence, custody, optimize, cogs. USB endpoint http://169.254.42.1/mcp is implicitly trusted (ADR-057). For WiFi/LAN use https://169.254.42.1:8443/mcp with Authorization: Bearer ${COGNITUM_SEED_TOKEN} after installing the trust CA (drive: trust/install-trust.sh). Override host via COGNITUM_SEED_MCP_URL. Requires the seed plugged in with its USB-ethernet (cdc_ncm) link up.

cognitum.comment: Cognitum cloud control plane (catalog / CRM / fleet / docs, ~7 tools). Read tools are open; write ops need COGNITUM_API_KEY. Host-independent (cloud).

Figma.comment: Figma remote MCP server — the bidirectional design<->code connector for the Sidebar Design System Companion (file_key z7aJ8uZrOsvfnWlsApN0Bu; see design-system-reference/figma/sidebar-design-system-companion.json). Figma is a controlled design INPUT; DESIGN.md, colors_and_type.css, and the mapped Vue components remain implementation authority. Authenticate via the MCP client OAuth flow (claude.ai connector settings, or `claude mcp` / `/mcp` in an interactive session) — no Figma token is stored on disk. Account is Pro tier, so official Code Connect stays seat_gated; read (get_design_context/get_metadata/get_screenshot/get_variable_defs) and write (use_figma) both work. Tools surface as mcp__Figma__*.
